data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: All data transactions are encrypted using robust protocols.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 is employed for all data in transit.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: The site is protected against DDoS attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes advanced firewall and DDoS prevention services from providers like Cloudflare.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages third-party cybersecurity firms for in-depth penetration testing.

data.title: Multifactor Authentication
data.description: MFA is implemented for accessing sensitive parts of the platform.
data.technical_spec: Supports 2FA through mobile apps and biometric authentication.

data.title: Secure Coding Practices
data.description: Strict adherence to secure coding standards to mitigate common vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates OWASP recommended practices and code reviews.
